summary: RPA-CONTRACT-003 holds: every recipe detect() is pure fs reads (readFile/readJsonIfExists), no network/child_process/LLM (grep-verified; git-fingerprint execFile is only on the fix path, same as an operator's verify record). RPA-CONTRACT-005 holds: runSingleRecipe try/catches detect and fix independently, converting exceptions to action_taken failed without aborting the loop. Writes are scoped to verification-evidence.json (+status artifact) and .vibepro/config.json, matching manual operator actions. Dry-run invokes no fix and returns planned before any write. pr-manager wiring: preflight computed once and threaded into all 4 buildAutopilotResult call sites, so no early-return branch drops it. Focused 19/19, e2e 8/8.

inspection.summary: Read recipe-preflight.js end-to-end, grepped for child_process/fetch/http across the recipe call graph, read pr-manager autopilot integration including every buildAutopilotResult call site, self-ran the focused suite, inspected focused/e2e/full-suite logs.
inspection.evidence: node --test test/recipe-preflight.test.js (19/19, run by reviewer); grep of buildAutopilotResult call sites (4/4 pass preflight); /tmp/vibepro-rpa-fulltest-final.log grep (no failure markers)

judgment_delta: initial: fix-path git usage might violate the pure-detection contract, and early-return branches might drop preflight -> final: pass, because CONTRACT-003 scopes purity to detect() which is grep-clean, and all 4 result call sites explicitly thread preflight
